text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All right, I think I got all the groceries I need.
Time to head back.

text_block_list.name: Supermarket Kid
text_block_list.text:
So you've come, Evil Queen Nature! Take this!
Carrot Ranger Kiiick!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
What the?! Hey, you're the kid from the
supermarket! What are you doin—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
(Ugh... I can feel everyone staring at me, waiting
for my next move...)

text_block_list.name: Children
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Natie! See ya next time!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Where... do they get all that... energy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The epic battle has left Nice Nature drained.
